properties.query: SELECT m.name as member_name, c.title as course_title, c.course_id as course_id FROM favorites f JOIN members m ON f.member_id = m.member_id JOIN courses c ON f.course_id = c.course_id WHERE f.member_id = ?
SELECT c.title FROM courses c JOIN studying_courses s ON c.course_id = s.course_id WHERE s.status = '수강완료' and s.member_id=?
INSERT INTO course_reviews (member_id, course_id, contents, rating) SELECT ?, c.course_id, ?, ? FROM courses c WHERE c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%');
SELECT c.title FROM courses c JOIN studying_courses s ON c.course_id = s.course_id WHERE s.member_id = ? AND s.status = CASE ? WHEN 2 THEN '수강 중' WHEN 3 THEN '수강완료' END
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lectures l WHERE l.course_id = ? AND l.lecture_id NOT IN ( SELECT lh.lecture_id FROM lecture_histories lh WHERE lh.member_id = ? AND lh.status = 'COMPLETED' )
UPDATE studying_courses SET status = '수강완료' WHERE member_id = ? AND course_id = ?
SELECT c.title as title , r.contents as contents, r.rating as rating FROM courses c JOIN course_reviews r ON c.course_id = r.course_id WHERE r.member_id=?

SELECT c.title AS title, teacher.name AS teacher_name, r.contents AS contents, r.rating AS rating, CONCAT(LEFT(student.name, 1), ' ● ● ') AS review_writer FROM courses c JOIN course_reviews r ON c.course_id = r.course_id JOIN members teacher ON c.member_id = teacher.member_id AND teacher.role = 'TEACHER' JOIN members student ON r.member_id = student.member_id AND student.role = 'STUDENT' WHERE c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%');

SELECT c.title AS title, r.contents AS contents, r.rating AS rating, CONCAT(LEFT(student.name, 1), ' ● ● ') AS review_writer FROM courses c JOIN course_reviews r ON c.course_id = r.course_id JOIN members student ON r.member_id = student.member_id AND student.role = 'STUDENT' WHERE c.member_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_reviews r JOIN courses c ON r.course_id = c.course_id WHERE r.member_id = ? AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
INSERT INTO lecture_histories (member_id, lecture_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'COMPLETED')
INSERT INTO studying_courses (course_id, member_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, '수강 중')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM studying_courses WHERE member_id = ? AND course_id = ?
DELETE FROM favorites WHERE member_id = ? AND course_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE member_id = ? AND course_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM studying_courses WHERE member_id = ? AND course_id = ?
SELECT c.course_id, c.title, c.member_id, m.name AS teacher_name FROM courses c JOIN members m ON c.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
